name: OSHA vs workers comp for bad ventilation at work?
description: OSHA enforces safety, comp pays benefits.

mainEntity.name: OSHA vs workers comp for bad ventilation at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: OSHA enforces safety, comp pays benefits.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**OSHA for citations/fines on hazards; comp for your personal benefits.**

OSHA enforces safety, no payout; comp compensates injury[1][4][5]. File both.

- OSHA complaint anonymous.
- Comp needs injury proof.
- OSHA aids comp evidence.

Report OSHA for fixes; pursue comp for losses. Complementary[1].
